mapper.select: select mbr_id ,mbr_pwd ,mbr_cell_num ,mbr_nm ,party_cd ,qr_stat ,dgt_qr_cd ,ppr_qr_cd ,store_id ,chg_pwd_dtm ,lst_lgn_dtm ,cre_dtm ,chg_dtm from CRBN_MBR_INFO WHERE mbr_id = #{mbrId}

/* 1. ID: selectAdmList 2. 업무명: 관리자의 리스트 3. 업무설명: */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT mbr_id ,mbr_pwd ,mbr_cell_num ,mbr_nm ,party_cd ,qr_stat ,dgt_qr_cd ,ppr_qr_cd ,store_no ,chg_pwd_dtm ,lst_lgn_dtm ,cre_dtm ,chg_dtm from CRBN_MBR_INFO where party_cd = #{partyCd} ORDER BY doc_seq DESC ) A LIMIT #{pageNo}, #{listSize}

/* 1. ID: selectAdmListCount 2. 업무명: 뉴스 3. 업무설명: 관리자 뉴스 리스트 총갯수 */
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CRBN_MBR_INFO where party_cd = #{partyCd}

/* 1. ID: selectDesc 2. 업무명: 모바일의 상세조회 3. 업무설명: */ select * from ( select mbr_id ,mbr_nm ,qr_stat,dgt_qr_cd,ppr_qr_cd,m.lst_lgn_dtm, m.party_cd, DATE_FORMAT(m.cre_dtm, '%Y%m%d') cre_dtm ,s.store_id from CRBN_MBR_INFO m LEFT JOIN CRBN_STORE_INFO s ON m.mbr_cell_num = s.store_cell_num WHERE m.mbr_cell_num = #{mbrCellNum} and mbr_pwd =#{mbrPwd} union select '' , store_ceo_nm ,'','','', lst_lgn_dtm, party_cd, '' ,store_id from CRBN_STORE_INFO WHERE store_cell_num = #{mbrCellNum} and store_pwd =#{mbrPwd} ) as a limit 0, 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM CRBN_MBR_INFO where mbr_cell_num = #{mbrCellNum}
mapper.update: UPDATE CRBN_MBR_INFO SET mbr_pwd =#{mbrPwd} ,chg_pwd_dtm = now() WHERE mbr_id = #{mbrId}
UPDATE CRBN_MBR_INFO SET lst_lgn_dtm = now() WHERE mbr_id = #{mbrId}
UPDATE CRBN_STORE_INFO SET lst_lgn_dtm = now() WHERE store_id = #{regStoreId}
